verdict: The chart is highly repetitive, copy-pasting a single asymmetric pattern for almost the entire main section, leading to a tedious and unbalanced gameplay experience.

issues.problem: Extreme repetitiveness. The 'U -> D -> L -> JUMP LR' loop is repeated continuously for over 35 seconds with almost no variation, making the main chorus incredibly boring and lazy.

Asymmetric and awkward foot flow. The repeated pattern forces either an awkward double-step into the jump, or an unbalanced stance where the left foot does most of the lateral movement while the right foot remains static.
Isolated 16th notes. Tapping D at 63.354 right before a JUMP LR at 63.479 creates an abrupt, uncomfy one-footed jump transition that is not introduced anywhere else in the chart.
The density collapses completely in the outro, leaving very sparse, disconnected notes that drag on without satisfyingly matching the fading energy of the track.
